rationale: The proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). Fam. Code §107.023 governs attorney and guardian ad litem fees in family law suits. The two provisions address unrelated subject matter with no operative overlap.
quote: Sec. 107.023. FEES, COURT COSTS, AND EXPENSES IN SUITS OTHER THAN SUITS BY GOVERNMENTAL ENTITY.
_note: No conflict; the cited rule is inapplicable to the proposed homestead exemption change.
